# Stackless Runtime Overview

This directory now ships two versions of the overview:

- [`OVERVIEW_VERIFIED.md`](./OVERVIEW_VERIFIED.md) — matches the current implementation.
- [`OVERVIEW_FUTURE.md`](./OVERVIEW_FUTURE.md) — captures ideas and open questions.

Start with the verified document when you need the ground truth; skim the future doc when you are brainstorming or planning new work.
